title: MikroTik Cloud Router Switch CRS320-8P-8B-4S+RM
description: The Cloud Router Switch CRS320-8P-8B-4S+RM is a PoE switch supporting the 802.3af/at and 802.3bt standards with a total PoE budget of 600 W (up to 1150 W with an additional power supply). The switch offers 17 Gigabit LAN ports, the first eight supports 802.3af/at PoE (maximum 30 W/port), the next eight supports 802.3af/at/bt (maximum 90 W/port), and it also includes 4 10 Gigabit SFP+ ports. It is powered by a Hot-swap power supply with a capacity of 600 W, with the option to purchase a second… 17x 10/100/1000 Mbps LAN 4x SFP+ (10 Gbps) 8x 802.3af/at (30 W/port) + 8x 802.3af/at/bt (90 W/port) PoE budget of 600 W - expandable up to 1150 W 1x Hot-Swap power supply, 1x free slot for expanding the total PoE capacity Console RJ45 port Operating system RouterOS v7 Level 5 Device Power cable 19" rack mount brackets
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (17) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Optical interfaces (4) 1G/2.5G/10Gbps Serial port RJ45 Power Power type Mains power (230V) PoE type PoE-Out (only) PoE-Out standards 802.3af, 802.3at, 802.3bt PoE Out ports 16 PoE budget [W] 600 Max. power consumption [W] 36 Power via connector/terminal 230V AC (directly to the wall outlet) Physical characteristics Design Rackmount "U" positions 1 Fans Yes Chassis design Metal Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 10 up to 50 Width [mm] 444 Height [mm] 44 Depth [mm] 235 Hardware CPU 98DX226S CPU frequency [MHz] 800 CPU cores 2 Internal storage [MB] 32 RAM [MB] 256
